description_long: This is a brick bungalow set within a fenced yard, featuring a gable roof with visible wooden rafters and a chimney. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a manicured hedge garden, and a central outdoor area with a swimming pool and a slide. A large tree with a wooden treehouse is situated to one side, providing a playful and shaded retreat. The windows are arranged in a regular pattern, with flower boxes beneath some of them, and the main entrance is sheltered by a small overhang. The backyard is landscaped with grass, hedges, and a paved path leading to the pool area. The overall scene is detailed, evoking a suburban residential setting with recreational and family-friendly features.
description: A brick bungalow with a gable roof, garage, pool, treehouse, and landscaped yard enclosed by a fence. The property features regular window arrangements, a driveway, and a central garden area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and the full landscaped yard with pool and treehouse visible to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool with slide, the treehouse, and the side of the bungalow with visible windows and garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the pool area, and the large tree with treehouse on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable end of the bungalow, the garage, and the treehouse in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
